description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a solid black exterior. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be plush and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, extending to the same height as the backrest, and each side includes a cylindrical bolster pillow. The legs are short, metallic, and positioned at the corners, giving the sofa a slightly elevated stance and a contemporary look. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, contributing to its clean and understated aesthetic. This type of sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A sleek, black, three-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, plush cushions, and metallic corner legs. Its minimalist design and smooth upholstery make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and cylindrical bolster pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, cushion depth, and short metallic legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous, smooth back panel with no visible seams or detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, with metallic legs visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and attached, with two cylindrical bolster pillows at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a minimalist and modern profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, metallic legs positioned at the corners, with a simple cylindrical shape and exposed finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
